structure_description: Categorization against a closed label set: documents are grouped by the 6 specified cause-of-action labels based on evidence; DOC1 and DOC3 map to '行政行为-行政征收' (taxonomy link: house expropriation), DOC6 to '产品责任纠纷', DOC8 to '行政行为-行政处罚' (taxonomy link: fine), DOC9 to '执行案由-先予执行' (taxonomy link: execution objection suit); DOC2, DOC4, DOC5, DOC7 have no evidence and are excluded.

records.category: 适用特殊程序案件案由
